heading: Termination of proclamations
label: 1885 Termination of proclamations
notes: Amendments1975—Subsec. (a). struck out subsec. (a) which provided for termination of or withdrawal from trade agreements. See .Pub. L. 93–618section 2135 of this title
amendments: Amendments1975—Subsec. (a). struck out subsec. (a) which provided for termination of or withdrawal from trade agreements. See .Pub. L. 93–618section 2135 of this title

children.label: b
children.text: The President may at any time terminate, in whole or in part, any proclamation made under this subchapter.
